'''Tiz''' was a [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] trooper stationed on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. She encountered [[Alema Rar]], but was persuaded to let her pass. Alema also told her and her partner to have some fun and they began "pulling at each others utilities."

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}
